Liz, who was at the medium?
Like you, Tanya, Chelsea?
And Riley.
I'm not sure if you know Riley, but yeah.
So it was mostly just back and forth with Chelsea, which was really helpful.
Probably going to reach out for them for a little bit of a clearer outline of brand identity, I guess, is what it sounds like they're doing a lot of lift on right now.
So that would be also really helpful to us.
Yeah.
Well, and if you haven't met Mason yet from our side.

Mason, you, he's working, like, internally, he's kind of our point person right now in, like, marketing and social media, so there's some overlap there with brand identity, because I know he's working closely with command on some of that.
Okay, great.
You want to throw Mason in, that could be helpful.
Absolutely.
Thank you.
Yeah.
All right, well, cool.
I will talk to you guys later, I'm sure.
I'm going to go wrangle these dogs for their walk before we lose daylight.
The days are smartening.
Enjoy.
Talk to you all soon.
Thank you.
See ya.
